name: VectorFlow
description: VectorFlow builds routing infrastructure that helps Solana teams automate on-chain treasury and payment flows with verifiable controls.
team_background: The founding team previously shipped developer tooling, Solana indexers, and treasury automation systems across two funded startups and one open-source protocol.
market_summary: The product targets treasury-heavy Solana teams, agentic finance builders, and infrastructure operators that need deterministic release controls.
traction_summary: The startup reports active pilots, repeat design partners, and early subscription revenue.

requested_milestones.name: Partner launches
requested_milestones.description: Launch design partners and KPI reporting.

requested_milestones.name: General availability
requested_milestones.description: Release public product and verification tooling.
